title: Crate Reader Diagnostics Contract

included: stable diagnostic codes for USDC reader failures
early-exit ordering: header diagnostics before TOC, TOC before sections, sections before values
deferred: diagnostic recovery (the reader fails on the first hard error)
multi-diagnostic reporting in a single file
diagnostics for composition, value resolution, or stage population

InvalidUsdcHeader.produced_when: the opened payload does not begin with the PXR-USDC magic, or the payload is shorter than 24 bytes

UnsupportedUsdcVersion.produced_when: the version triple has major != 0 or minor outside [8, 12]

MalformedUsdcBootstrap.produced_when: the table-of-contents offset is outside the opened payload or arithmetic on (offset, size) overflows

MalformedUsdcToc.produced_when: the LZ4-decompressed TOC buffer is too short for the section count, the TOC does not end at the file's last byte, a section name is not ASCII or not NUL-terminated within 16 bytes, a section offset+size exceeds the opened payload, or duplicate section names appear in the TOC

MalformedUsdcLz4Buffer.produced_when: the LZ4 envelope chunk count or per-chunk compressed size leads to a buffer overrun, or the LZ4 stream itself is corrupt

MalformedUsdcCompressedIntArray.produced_when: the outer compressed_size leads to an overrun, the inner codepoint stream's non-zero padding is detected, or the per-codepoint values stream exhausts before all elements decode

MalformedUsdcSection.produced_when: a required section is missing for a feature the layer exercises, a STRINGS/FIELDSETS/PATHS/SPECS index references outside its table, or TOKENS index 0 is referenced from element_token_indices

MalformedUsdcValueRepresentation.produced_when: an invalid flag combination is encountered (Inlined+Array, Inlined+Compressed, Inlined+Array+Compressed), or a Compressed flag is set on a non-simple type (quat, matrix, etc.)

UnsupportedUsdcFeature.produced_when: a value type introduced at Crate 0.10.0 or later is encountered under a version triple that does not require its support (Splines, Relocates, PathExpression), or any value type outside the AOUSD 1.0.1 type table is encountered
UnsupportedUsdcFeature.must_not_produce: placeholder JSON values or silent drops

MalformedUsdcSpecForm.produced_when: a spec form value outside the normative (0, 1, 6, 7, 8, 10, 11) and compatibility (2, 3, 4, 5, 9) sets is encountered

DuplicateSpecPath.produced_when: two SPECS entries resolve to the same document-model path
DuplicateSpecPath.shape: {severity: 'error', code: 'DuplicateSpecPath', message: 'duplicate spec path', path: '<the duplicated path>'}

ResourceOpenFailed.produced_when: the layer-open boundary received an opened payload with ok=false from usd-resource-protocol; this code is the canonical pass-through of resource-layer failures

ordering_invariants: InvalidUsdcHeader and UnsupportedUsdcVersion must be checked before any TOC byte is read
MalformedUsdcBootstrap and MalformedUsdcToc must be checked before any section_bytes call
MalformedUsdcSection (missing or out-of-range table reference) must be checked before any spec is stored in the document model
MalformedUsdcValueRepresentation and UnsupportedUsdcFeature must be checked before any partial dump is emitted
a failed parse must not emit a 'layer' object in the canonical dump (per contracts/layer-dump.schema.json)
laws: diagnostic codes listed here are the canonical set; ad-hoc codes are a contract violation
diagnostics are target-native until serialized at the dump-adapter boundary
the canonical dump must include only diagnostics from the canonical set; goldens match on diagnostic code exactly
value types deferred at the version-range boundary (Splines, Relocates, PathExpression on minor < 10) must produce UnsupportedUsdcFeature; placeholder JSON is a contract violation
diagnostic ordering must follow the ordering_invariants; emitting a value-level diagnostic before a TOC-level diagnostic is a contract violation
golden_groups: MalformedUsdcToc: decompressed TOC too short, duplicate section names, TOC not at end of file
MalformedUsdcSection: STRINGS Index out of TOKENS range; element_token_indices referencing TOKENS index 0
UnsupportedUsdcFeature: PathExpression value encountered under a minor=8 fixture
DuplicateSpecPath: two SPECS entries resolving to the same path
diagnostic ordering: a fixture with both an out-of-range version and a corrupt TOC reports UnsupportedUsdcVersion (not MalformedUsdcToc)
